bird.name: Red-and-white antpitta
bird.summary: The red-and-white antpitta (Grallaria erythroleuca) is a species of bird in the family Grallariidae. It is endemic to Peru.

locations.name: 次生林
locations.summary: 次生林，又名天然次生林、再生林、再生森林、二次林。是指原始穩定的森林植被遭到人類活動干擾（刀耕火種、林木砍伐）或同等破壞性的自然現象之後，主要透過自然過程再生形成的森林或林地區域。其特徵有別於未曾遭受近期干擾的原始森林、複雜的早期遷移階段…

relations.subject: Red-and-white antpitta
relations.evidence: It inhabits the understory in the interior and edges of humid subtropical montane forest and mature secondary forest

relations.subject: Red-and-white antpitta
relations.evidence: It inhabits the understory in the interior and edges of humid subtropical montane forest and mature secondary forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Red-and-white antpitta
relations.evidence: In the longer term, habitat destruction could pose a significant threat, in view of the species' small geographic range, although currently much of this area lacks roads and has a low human population density."
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
